# CLI UX and Diagnostics Expert Skill

This skill covers `postgresPacTools` command design, console UX, verbosity behavior, error and
exit-code handling, troubleshooting output, and alignment between CLI docs and actual command
behavior.

## Use this skill when changing
- `src/postgresPacTools/Program.cs`
- CLI help/option behavior
- command diagnostics
- verbose output behavior
- CLI README guidance
- user-facing workflow messaging

## Primary references
- `SKILL.md`
- `../../../docs/features/embedded-skills/CLI_UX_AND_DIAGNOSTICS_RESEARCH.md`
- `../../../src/postgresPacTools/README.md`
